meaning: n.好莱坞(位于美国加利福尼亚洛杉矶城的西北),美国电影业
examples: She is one of the Hollywood immortals.
The film has a Hollywood happy ending.
The film is an indictment of Hollywood.
With its beautiful natural light and mild climate, Hollywood would attract countless movie-makers to come.
There is no compelling evidence to suggest that Napster -style trading of movies is harming Hollywood.
